---
title: "Ladybug PopGen -- Directory Tree & File Reference"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: true
      smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: default
---

# Ladybug PopGen -- Directory Tree & File Reference

**Purpose:** Complete directory structure and output locations for the C. septempunctata population genomics project. Use this document when creating or locating files.

**Last Updated:** 2026-04-13

---

# 1. Top-Level Directory Structure

```
BIOL624_Project_Fall_2025/
|-- METHODS.md                            # Comprehensive methods documentation
|-- README.md                             # Project overview
|-- Population genomics of C. septempunctata.docx  # Manuscript draft
|-- data/                                 # Input data and reference genomes
|-- metadata/                             # Sample metadata and population definitions
|-- project_notes/                        # Project documentation suite
|-- results/                              # All analysis outputs
|-- scripts/                              # Analysis scripts (R, Python, Bash)
```

---

# 2. data/

Input VCF files, reference genomes, BLAST databases, GO annotation sources, and PLINK binary files.

## 2.1 Variant Data

```
data/
|-- WG_VARIANTS/
|   |-- filtered_variants.vcf             # Whole-genome filtered VCF (text)
|   |-- filtered_variants.vcf.gz          # Whole-genome filtered VCF (compressed)
|
|-- VARIANTS_BY_CHR/
|   |-- chr_filter.sh                     # Script to split VCF by chromosome
|   |-- FILTERED_CHR_VCFS/
|   |   |-- NC_0581{89..98}.1.filtered.vcf.gz   # Per-chromosome VCFs (chr 1-10)
|   |
|   |-- CHR_PCAS/
|       |-- C7_CHR_PCA.Rmd               # Per-chromosome PCA analysis notebook
|       |-- C7_Chromosome_{1..9}_PCA.png  # PCA scatter plots per chromosome
|       |-- CHR_PLINK_OUTPUTS/
|           |-- NC_0581{89..98}.1_ld_pruned.*   # PLINK LD-pruned outputs per chr
|               # Extensions: .bed, .bim, .fam, .eigenval, .eigenvec,
|               #             .log, .nosex, .prune.in, .prune.out,
|               #             _modified.eigenvec
|
|-- VARIANTS_BY_SAMPLE/
|   |-- NLD3.g.vcf.gz                    # Per-sample gVCF (example)
```

## 2.2 PLINK Binary Files (Whole-Genome)

```
data/plink/
|-- ladybug_snps.*                        # Whole-genome PLINK set (.bed/.bim/.fam/.log/.nosex)
|-- ladybug_snps_qc.*                     # QC outputs (.imiss/.lmiss/.log/.nosex)
|-- chr_NC_0581{89..98}.1.*               # Per-chromosome PLINK sets (.bed/.bim/.fam/.log/.nosex)
|-- merge_list.txt                        # Merge manifest for PLINK
```

## 2.3 Reference Genomes & Annotations

Each NCBI dataset directory follows the same structure: `README.md`, `md5sum.txt`, and a `ncbi_dataset/data/` tree containing assembly FASTA, GFF annotations, and protein FASTA.

```
data/
|-- coccinella_septempunctata_/           # C. septempunctata reference genome
|   |-- ncbi_dataset/data/
|       |-- GCA_907165205.1/              # GenBank assembly
|       |-- GCF_907165205.1/              # RefSeq assembly
|           |-- GCF_907165205.1_icCocSept1.1_genomic.fna
|           |-- genomic.gff
|           |-- protein.faa
|
|-- harmonia_axyridis_ncbi_dataset/       # H. axyridis (comparison species)
|   |-- ncbi_dataset/data/
|       |-- GCA_914767665.1/
|       |-- GCF_914767665.1/              # RefSeq assembly + GFF + protein
|
|-- leptinotarsa_decemlineata_ncbi_dataset/  # L. decemlineata (outgroup)
|   |-- ncbi_dataset/data/
|       |-- GCA_000500325.2/
|       |-- GCF_000500325.1/              # RefSeq assembly + GFF + protein
|
|-- tribolium_castaneum_ncbi_dataset/     # T. castaneum (model beetle, GO source)
|   |-- ncbi_dataset/data/
|       |-- GCA_031307605.1/
|       |-- GCF_031307605.1/              # RefSeq assembly + GFF + protein
|
|-- blast_db/                             # BLAST databases (built from above)
```

## 2.4 GO Annotations

```
data/go_annotations/
|-- gene2go                               # NCBI gene2go mapping
|-- harmonia_protein2gene.tsv             # H. axyridis protein-to-gene map
|-- tribolium_gene2go.tsv                 # T. castaneum gene-to-GO
|-- tribolium_protein2gene.tsv            # T. castaneum protein-to-gene map
|-- tribolium_refseq_go.tsv              # T. castaneum RefSeq GO terms
|-- tribolium_uniprot_go.tsv             # T. castaneum UniProt GO terms
```

---

# 3. metadata/

```
metadata/
|-- C7_samples_locations.xlsx             # Original sample location spreadsheet
|-- C7_samples_locations_updated.xlsx     # Updated sample locations
|-- samples.tsv                           # Full sample metadata (all fields)
|-- popmap.txt                            # Sample-to-population mapping (2 columns)
|-- pop_CHI.txt                           # China (native range) sample list
|-- pop_EEU.txt                           # Eastern Europe sample list
|-- pop_USA.txt                           # North America sample list
|-- pop_WEU.txt                           # Western Europe sample list
|-- create_metadata.log                   # Log from metadata creation
|-- parse_report.tsv                      # Parsed report for metadata QC
```

**Population codes:** CHI = China (native), EEU = Eastern Europe, USA = North America, WEU = Western Europe.

---

# 4. scripts/

All analysis scripts. Organized below by pipeline stage.

## 4.1 Metadata & Preprocessing

| Script | Language | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| `create_metadata.py` | Python | Generate samples.tsv, popmap.txt, pop_*.txt from raw metadata |

## 4.2 Diversity

| Script | Language | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| `diversity.sh` | Bash | Run vcftools pi and Tajima's D in 5kb windows per population per chromosome |
| `plot_diversity.R` | R | Generate per-chromosome and faceted diversity plots |
| `create_diversity_tables.R` | R | Summary tables for diversity statistics |
| `create_population_pi_table.R` | R | Population-level pi summary tables (TSV + PDF/PNG) |
| `create_population_tajima_table.R` | R | Population-level Tajima's D summary tables (TSV + PDF/PNG) |

## 4.3 FST

| Script | Language | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| `fst.sh` | Bash | Run vcftools windowed and genome-wide FST for all pairwise comparisons |
| `plot_fst.r` | R | Manhattan-style FST plots per chromosome and faceted |
| `summarize_fst.R` | R | Cumulative FST summary reports |

## 4.4 Selection Scans

| Script | Language | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| `run_outflank_from_vcf.R` | R | Run OutFLANK per pairwise comparison from VCF input |
| `outflank_diagnostic.R` | R | Diagnostic plots and stats for OutFLANK model fit |
| `diagnose_outflank_issue.R` | R | Debug zero-outlier OutFLANK results |
| `diagnose_zero_outliers.R` | R | Further zero-outlier diagnostics |
| `visualize_outflank_results.R` | R | Visualization of OutFLANK results |
| `calculate_outflank_concordance.R` | R | Concordance between OutFLANK and percentile outliers |
| `pcadapt_selection_scan.R` | R | pcadapt-based genome scan |
| `unified_selection_scan.R` | R | Merge FST percentile outliers with OutFLANK, categorize patterns |
| `comprehensive_selection_scan.R` | R | Final integration: multi-threshold outliers, annotation, confidence levels, Figure 1 |
| `merge_selection_metrics.R` | R | Merge selection metrics across methods |

## 4.5 Annotation & Enrichment

| Script | Language | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| `annotate_snps.py` | Python | Annotate SNP positions using GFF |
| `annotate_outliers_local.py` | Python | Local annotation of outlier windows with gene info |
| `annotate_outliers_with_go.py` | Python | Add GO terms to annotated outliers |
| `enrich_from_gff.py` | Python | Extract gene info from GFF for enrichment |
| `enrich_gene_annotations.py` | Python | Gene-level annotation enrichment |
| `enrich_gene_annotations_local.py` | Python | Local version of gene annotation enrichment |
| `go_enrichment_analysis.R` | R | GO term enrichment analysis and visualization |
| `add_fst_to_enriched_snps.R` | R | Append FST values to enriched SNP tables |

## 4.6 Miscellaneous

```
scripts/Rscript                           # Rscript wrapper (if applicable)
```

---

# 5. results/

## 5.1 FST Results

```
results/fst/
|-- {POP1}_vs_{POP2}/                     # One directory per pairwise comparison
|   |                                     # Comparisons: CHI_vs_EEU, CHI_vs_USA,
|   |                                     #   CHI_vs_WEU, EEU_vs_USA, EEU_vs_WEU, USA_vs_WEU
|   |-- fst/
|   |   |-- NC_0581{89..98}.1.filtered.windowed.weir.fst   # Windowed FST (5kb)
|   |-- fst_genomewide/
|   |   |-- NC_0581{89..98}.1.filtered.weir.fst            # Per-SNP FST
|   |-- fst_genomewide_table.tsv          # Summary: weighted genome-wide FST
|
|-- figs/
|   |-- combined/
|   |   |-- All_FST_faceted_{POP1}_vs_{POP2}.png           # Faceted Manhattan plots
|   |-- per_chromosome/
|       |-- FST_NC_0581{89..98}.1.filtered_{POP1}_vs_{POP2}.png  # Per-chr Manhattan
|
|-- fst_cumulative_report.txt             # Text summary across all comparisons
|-- fst_cumulative_summary.tsv            # Table summary across all comparisons
|-- logs/
    |-- fst_{POP1}_vs_{POP2}_*.log        # Run logs with timestamps
```

## 5.2 OutFLANK Results

```
results/outflank_results/
|-- {POP1}_vs_{POP2}/                     # Per-comparison directories
|   |-- outflank_results_{POP1}_vs_{POP2}.csv   # Full OutFLANK output table
|   |-- outflank_plots_{POP1}_vs_{POP2}.pdf     # Diagnostic/result plots
|   |-- outflank_outliers_{POP1}_vs_{POP2}.csv  # Outlier SNPs (where detected)
|-- logs/                                 # OutFLANK run logs
```

## 5.3 OutFLANK Diagnostics

```
results/outflank_diagnostic/
|-- {POP1}_vs_{POP2}/                     # Per-comparison directories
|   |-- diagnostic_stats.tsv              # Model fit statistics
|   |-- outflank_full_results.rds         # R object with full OutFLANK output
|   |-- plot_fst_distribution.*           # FST distribution (PDF + PNG)
|   |-- plot_fst_vs_het.*                 # FST vs heterozygosity (PDF + PNG)
|   |-- plot_qvalue_distribution.*        # q-value distribution (PDF + PNG)
|   |-- outliers_q01.tsv                  # Outliers at q < 0.01 (where detected)
|   |-- outliers_q05.tsv                  # Outliers at q < 0.05 (where detected)
|
|-- concordance/
|   |-- concordance_summary.tsv           # Cross-method concordance summary
|   |-- concordance_summary.txt           # Text report
|   |-- concordance_plot.*                # Concordance visualization (PDF + PNG)
|   |-- concordant_windows_{comparison}_{threshold}.tsv  # Concordant window lists
|
|-- diagnostic_summary_all.tsv            # Combined diagnostics across comparisons
```

## 5.4 Unified Selection Scan

```
results/unified_selection_scan/
|-- percentile_outliers_{0.5,1,2}pct.tsv          # FST percentile outlier windows
|-- outflank_validation/
|   |-- concordance_{comparison}.tsv               # Per-comparison concordance
|   |-- validation_summary.tsv                     # Validation summary
|-- pattern_categorization/
|   |-- both_pattern_windows.tsv                   # Outliers in BOTH native-vs-invasive AND among-invasive
|   |-- invasion_specific_windows.tsv              # Outliers only in native-vs-invasive
|   |-- post_invasion_windows.tsv                  # Outliers only among invasive populations
|-- plots/
|   |-- biological_patterns.png
|   |-- outflank_concordance.png
|   |-- outliers_per_comparison.png
|-- summary_report.txt
```

## 5.5 Whole-Population Results

### 5.5.1 Diversity (pi and Tajima's D)

```
results/whole_pop_results/
|-- pi/
|   |-- NC_0581{89..98}.1.filtered.windowed.pi    # Windowed pi per chromosome
|-- pi_sites/
|   |-- NC_0581{89..98}.1.filtered.sites.pi       # Per-site pi per chromosome
|-- tajima/
|   |-- NC_0581{89..98}.1.filtered.Tajima.D       # Windowed Tajima's D per chromosome
|-- figs/diversity/
|   |-- All_pi_faceted_whole_pop.png               # Faceted pi across all chromosomes
|   |-- All_TajimaD_faceted_whole_pop.png          # Faceted Tajima's D across all chr
|   |-- pi_NC_0581{89..98}.1.filtered.png          # Per-chromosome pi plots
|   |-- TajimaD_NC_0581{89..98}.1.filtered.png     # Per-chromosome Tajima's D plots
```

### 5.5.2 Summary Tables

```
results/whole_pop_results/summary/
|-- diversity_summary_report.txt          # Text report
|-- diversity_summary_table.tsv           # Diversity stats table
|-- fst_all_comparisons_report.txt        # FST across all comparisons text report
|-- fst_all_comparisons_summary.tsv       # FST summary table
|-- fst_cumulative_report.txt             # Cumulative FST report
|-- fst_cumulative_summary.tsv            # Cumulative FST table
|-- pi_population_detailed.tsv            # Per-population pi, detailed
|-- pi_population_detailed_table.*        # Rendered table (PDF + PNG)
|-- pi_population_means.tsv              # Per-population mean pi
|-- pi_population_means_table.*          # Rendered table (PDF + PNG)
|-- pi_summary_stats.tsv                 # Pi summary statistics
|-- pi_summary_table.*                   # Rendered table (PDF + PNG)
|-- pi_table.tsv                         # Raw pi table
|-- tajima_d_population_detailed.tsv     # Per-population Tajima's D, detailed
|-- tajima_d_population_detailed_table.* # Rendered table (PDF + PNG)
|-- tajima_d_population_means.tsv        # Per-population mean Tajima's D
|-- tajima_d_population_means_table.*    # Rendered table (PDF + PNG)
|-- tajima_d_summary_stats.tsv           # Tajima's D summary statistics
|-- tajima_d_summary_table.*             # Rendered table (PDF + PNG)
|-- tajima_d_table.tsv                   # Raw Tajima's D table
```

### 5.5.3 OutFLANK Summary

```
results/whole_pop_results/outflank_summary/
|-- method_assignments.tsv                # Which method assigned each outlier
|-- outflank_comprehensive_report.txt     # Full text report
|-- outflank_summary_statistics.tsv       # Summary stats
|-- outlier_summary_all_chroms.tsv        # Outlier counts per chromosome
```

### 5.5.4 Combined Outliers (Final Integration)

```
results/whole_pop_results/combined_outliers/
|-- all_outliers_top{0.5,1,2}pct.tsv              # All outlier windows per threshold
|-- all_outliers_annotated_top{0.5,1,2}pct.tsv    # Annotated outliers per threshold
|-- outliers_categorized_top{0.5,1,2}pct.tsv      # Pattern-categorized outliers
|-- shared_outliers_top{0.5,1,2}pct.tsv           # Outliers shared across comparisons
|-- gene_summary_top{0.5,1,2}pct.tsv              # Gene-level summaries per threshold
|-- robust_candidates_all_thresholds.tsv           # Candidates robust across thresholds
|-- threshold_comparison_summary.tsv               # Cross-threshold comparison
|-- summary_report.txt                             # Text summary of combined results
|-- fst_addition_summary.txt                       # Log of FST value additions
|
|-- # Top-10 SNP tables
|-- top10_snps_per_comparison_top{0.5,1,2}pct.tsv
|-- top10_snps_annotated_top{0.5,1,2}pct.tsv
|-- top10_snps_enriched_top{0.5,1,2}pct.tsv
|-- top10_snps_enriched_top0.5pct_go.tsv
|-- top10_snps_enriched_with_fst.tsv
|-- top10_snps_coords.bed
|-- super_candidates_top10_multiple_top{0.5,1,2}pct.tsv
|
|-- # GO enrichment
|-- outlier_gene2go.tsv                            # Gene-to-GO for outlier genes
|-- go_enrichment_results.tsv                      # GO enrichment (strict)
|-- go_enrichment_results_relaxed.tsv              # GO enrichment (relaxed thresholds)
|-- go_enrichment_barplot.*                         # Bar plot (PDF + PNG)
|-- go_enrichment_dotplot.*                         # Dot plot (PDF + PNG)
|-- go_enrichment_network.png                      # Network visualization
|-- enrichment_log.txt                             # Enrichment analysis log
|
|-- # Figure 1 (manuscript)
|-- figure1_manhattan_selection_landscape.png       # Raster (300 dpi)
|-- figure1_manhattan_selection_landscape.pdf       # Vector
|
|-- # Comparison plots (per threshold)
|-- comparison_plots/
    |-- top{0.5,1,2}pct/
        |-- biological_patterns.png
        |-- confidence_levels.png
        |-- outlier_overlap.png
        |-- outliers_per_comparison.png
        |-- top_snps_max_fst.png
```

### 5.5.5 Logs

```
results/whole_pop_results/logs/
|-- diversity_*.log                       # Diversity analysis run logs
|-- run_outflank_*.log                    # OutFLANK run logs (multiple iterations)
```

## 5.6 pcadapt

```
results/pcadapt/
|-- screeplot.png                         # Scree plot for K selection
|-- concordance/                          # pcadapt-OutFLANK concordance (empty or WIP)
```

---

# 6. project_notes/

```
project_notes/
|-- ladybug_master_doc.Rmd                # Architectural reference for the analysis pipeline
|-- ladybug_handoff.Rmd                   # Operational coordination document
|-- ladybug_session_log.Rmd               # Append-only session history
|-- ladybug_environment.Rmd               # Platform, dependencies, VCS reference
|-- ladybug_file_map.Rmd                  # This file -- directory tree and file reference
|-- ladybug_project_history.Rmd           # Chronological decision register
|-- BIOL624 Ladybug Project Notes.md      # Course project notes
|-- Population genomics of C. septempunctata.md  # Manuscript-related notes
|-- #notes on ldpruned dataset            # Notes on LD-pruned dataset decisions
|-- chr_filter.sh                         # Chromosome filtering script (copy/reference)
```

---

# 7. Chromosome Accession Reference

All per-chromosome files use NCBI RefSeq accession numbers. The mapping:

| Chromosome | Accession |
|------------|-----------|
| 1 | NC_058189.1 |
| 2 | NC_058190.1 |
| 3 | NC_058191.1 |
| 4 | NC_058192.1 |
| 5 | NC_058193.1 |
| 6 | NC_058194.1 |
| 7 | NC_058195.1 |
| 8 | NC_058196.1 |
| 9 | NC_058197.1 |
| 10 | NC_058198.1 |

---

# 8. Naming Conventions

- **Per-chromosome data files:** `NC_0581{89-98}.1.filtered.{ext}` where ext varies by analysis
- **Pairwise comparison directories:** `{POP1}_vs_{POP2}` (alphabetical order: CHI, EEU, USA, WEU)
- **Threshold-stratified outputs:** `*_top{0.5,1,2}pct.*` for FST percentile thresholds
- **Rendered tables:** `.tsv` (data) with companion `.pdf` and `.png` (rendered)
- **Plots:** `.png` (raster, 300 dpi) with `.pdf` (vector) where applicable
- **Logs:** `{analysis}_{YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS}.log`
